Class ConfiguredCLI

java.lang.Object
org.tquadrat.foundation.showcase.config.ConfiguredCLI
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: ConfiguredCLI.java 1080 2024-01-03 11:05:21Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.1.0") @ProgramClass public final class ConfiguredCLI extends Object
Shows the use of the configure CLI.
